chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH CIRCUIT COURT MIRPURKHAS Constitutional Petition No.S-211 of 2025 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 1. For order on office objection. 2. For hearing of main case. 05-11-2025. Mir Ali Bakhsh Talpur advocate for petitioner a/w petitioner. Mr. Muhammad Sharif Solangi, A.A.G. = Petitioner has prayed for protection as the official respondents are not allowing him to operate buses on the rout of Tando Allahyar to Mirwah via Chamber. Replies have been filed by the S.S.P, Mirpurkhas, S.S.P, Tando Allahyar, S.H.O P.S Chamber and S.H.O P.S Mirwah, wherein they have stated that they have not caused any harassment to the petitioner and undertake that they will act strictly in accordance with law. Learned counsel for the petitioner is satisfied in the wake of statements filed by the official respondents and seeks disposal of the petition. Order accordingly. In view of above, instant petition stands disposed of accordingly. JUDGE *Saleem*
